title: Verify Trial Corner displays accurate remaining trial days
description: Test that the Trial Corner hero section shows correct number of remaining trial days based on activation time
preconditions: User has active trial with known activation time
User is on Trial Corner page

steps.description: 1. Login as user with active trial
3. Observe the Hero section showing remaining days

expected_result: Hero section displays accurate 'X Days Remaining' based on trial start date and current time
